creator: ali.abdallah@suse.com
text:
Created attachment 195378
Increment the modify_counter when mixer_set is called.

From  sys/dev/sound/pcm/mixer.c:70
/**
  * Counter is incremented when applications change any of this
  * mixer's controls.  A change in value indicates that persistent
  * mixer applications should update their displays.
  */

But reading the code, it is clear that this is not the case, and the counter remains 0. It is enough to call m->modify_counter++ in mixer_set on line 327 for example to make persistent mixer applications work correctly. Currently they have to poll for all mixer controls, even if no changes were made to the mixer. 

The attached patch solves the problem.
